title: Carnegie Mellon University: AI Policy Staged Crawl Report
summary: Carnegie Mellon University repair run uses official CMU Eberly Center, Computing Services, University Policies, and Career Center pages. Claims cover course-level GenAI policy clarity, protected AI tools, public-tool restrictions, academic-integrity authorization/citation requirements, AI detection caution, and student career-material guidance.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

Several CMU pages are guidance rather than a single consolidated university-wide generative AI policy. The academic-integrity source is a formal policy but is not itself AI-specific; AI linkage is provided by CMU teaching and computing guidance.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
